mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_task_result (task_id, status, payload, error_msg) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{status}, #{payload}, #{errorMsg}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), payload = VALUES(payload), error_msg = VALUES(error_msg)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_task_result WHERE created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
